description:
Figma File Down Here! We're back at it with the top 7 modern layouts I stole from 50 different softwares (and a few non-softwares, I ran out, what can I say). If you don't hate it give me a thumbs up!

Figma file:
https://www.kolejain.com/resources?scrollTo=saas-sections

Join my design challenge with $2k in prizes (no joke!)
https://www.newform.community/challenge?referrer=youtube

The 50 softwares:
